tasks.prompt: Check R11D fair comparison training progress. Read the latest training logs from paper2_aihwkit_baseline/logs/ for r11d_6_pure_baseline, r11d_7_pcm_4bit, and r11d_8_hat_pcm. If all 3 runs are complete (look for "training complete" in the master runner output at /tmp/claude-1000/-home-qiaosir-projects-compute-vit/66eb087a-58f7-475a-a591-8fec51a5273e/tasks/bh90c8zgd.output), then: (1) run fresh-eval for all 3 checkpoints using paper2_aihwkit_baseline/eval_aihwkit_fresh.py, (2) run drift-eval for all 3 using paper2_aihwkit_baseline/eval_aihwkit_drift.py, (3) write the final report to outputs/r11d_fair_comparison_experiments_20260428-011225.md.
